'''dhotalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolffian|wolffian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolffian|wolffian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhotalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotalithi|dhotalithi]] || [[word:dhotaliji|dhotaliji]] || [[word:dhotalishi|dhotalishi]] || [[word:dhotaliki|dhotaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotaluthuthu|dhotaluthuthu]] || [[word:dhotalujuju|dhotalujuju]] || [[word:dhotalushushu|dhotalushushu]] || [[word:dhotalukuku|dhotalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotaluthu|dhotaluthu]] || [[word:dhotaluju|dhotaluju]] || [[word:dhotalushu|dhotalushu]] || [[word:dhotaluku|dhotaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotalufthuf|dhotalufthuf]] || [[word:dhotalufjuf|dhotalufjuf]] || [[word:dhotalufshuf|dhotalufshuf]] || [[word:dhotalufkuf|dhotalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotalethe|dhotalethe]] || [[word:dhotaleje|dhotaleje]] || [[word:dhotaleshe|dhotaleshe]] || [[word:dhotaleke|dhotaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotalothotho|dhotalothotho]] || [[word:dhotalojojo|dhotalojojo]] || [[word:dhotaloshosho|dhotaloshosho]] || [[word:dhotalokoko|dhotalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotalotho|dhotalotho]] || [[word:dhotalojo|dhotalojo]] || [[word:dhotalosho|dhotalosho]] || [[word:dhotaloko|dhotaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotalofthof|dhotalofthof]] || [[word:dhotalofjof|dhotalofjof]] || [[word:dhotalofshof|dhotalofshof]] || [[word:dhotalofkof|dhotalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf|dhotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotalĂŠthĂŠ|dhotalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhotalĂŠjĂŠ|dhotalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhotalĂŠshĂŠ|dhotalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhotalĂŠkĂŠ|dhotalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotalathatha|dhotalathatha]] || [[word:dhotalajaja|dhotalajaja]] || [[word:dhotalashasha|dhotalashasha]] || [[word:dhotalakaka|dhotalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotalatha|dhotalatha]] || [[word:dhotalaja|dhotalaja]] || [[word:dhotalasha|dhotalasha]] || [[word:dhotalaka|dhotalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotalafthaf|dhotalafthaf]] || [[word:dhotalafjaf|dhotalafjaf]] || [[word:dhotalafshaf|dhotalafshaf]] || [[word:dhotalafkaf|dhotalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhotalasha|dhotalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotalshĂ«sha|dhotalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotalrosha|dhotalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotalmusha|dhotalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotalyasha|dhotalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotalnkshĂ«sha|godhotalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotalnkrosha|godhotalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotalnkmusha|godhotalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotalnkyasha|godhotalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhotatalasha|dhotatalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotatalshĂ«sha|dhotatalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotatalrosha|dhotatalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotatalmusha|dhotatalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotatalyasha|dhotatalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotatalnkshĂ«sha|godhotatalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotatalnkrosha|godhotatalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotatalnkmusha|godhotatalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotatalnkyasha|godhotatalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhetĂŠlasha|dhetĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhetĂŠlshĂ«sha|dhetĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhetĂŠlrosha|dhetĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhetĂŠlmusha|dhetĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhetĂŠlyasha|dhetĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhetĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|godhetĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhetĂŠlnkrosha|godhetĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhetĂŠlnkmusha|godhetĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhetĂŠlnkyasha|godhetĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhotfalasha|dhotfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotfalshĂ«sha|dhotfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotfalrosha|dhotfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotfalmusha|dhotfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotfalyasha|dhotfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotfalnkshĂ«sha|godhotfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotfalnkrosha|godhotfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotfalnkmusha|godhotfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotfalnkyasha|godhotfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
